rag_rules: Repair only AGREE clauses with type mismatches or unresolved references in the same component scope as the diagnostic
Do not introduce new ports, features, or package references to fix type or reference errors
generic_rules: Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are declared as visible features or auxiliary variables within the same annex
Use only int, real, and bool as scalar types in AGREE declarations; avoid AADL type names like 'integer' or 'boolean'
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Assignment (assign) in implementation scope must target existing output ports or eq-declared variables
Boolean expressions must compare bool-typed operands; integer comparisons must use int-typed operands
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to resolve unresolved references by adding new package imports or external dependencies
Do not convert type-mismatched expressions with type casts or implicit conversions — fix the declaration type instead
